title: How to calculate age in years and months
task: Show an exact age (or tenure) as "X years, Y months" rather than just years.
keywords: age in years and months excel

excel.note: A2=start/birth date, B2=end date (use TODAY() for current age).

explanation: DATEDIF with "Y" gives complete years; "YM" gives the leftover months after those years are subtracted — together they make "34 years, 5 months" for a birthdate of Feb 10, 1992 as of July 21, 2026. Add DATEDIF(...,"MD") for leftover days if you want all three parts. DATEDIF is undocumented in Excel's function wizard but works in all three apps — a survivor from Lotus 1-2-3 compatibility.
